events.name: Pack Circling
events.gmPrompt: Low growling from multiple directions. Eyes glint at the edge of the firelight, circling closer.
events.checkContext: Animal Handling check to stare down the pack before they rush camp.
events.gmGuidance: The pack likely scatters if confronted aggressively. GM can absolutely set a proper fight here if it suits the table. Hook: generateEncounter(forest, tier, [beast, pack]). Fallback: provide a CR-appropriate wolf pack. At higher levels the wolves are not a real danger. Describe the eyes, the circling, the growl, and let the party handle it without a roll if the table would find the fight trivial. The scene is about the wildness of the forest, not the combat. Speak with Animals: the alpha communicates territory, hunger, and pack size. It is not interested in negotiation. The pack wants food or it wants to leave.
events.description: Low growling from multiple directions. Eyes glint at the edge of the firelight, circling.

onTriumph.narrative: You lock eyes with the alpha, feed the fire until it roars, and hold absolutely still. The alpha breaks first. The pack vanishes into the dark without a sound.

onSuccess.narrative: You hold your ground, keep the fire high, and stare them down. The pack circles twice more, then moves on.

onMixed.narrative: The pack rushes camp but the watchers drive them back quickly. A ration bag torn open in the chaos, but the response kept the damage contained.

onFailure.narrative: The pack walks straight through camp and takes everything edible. Ration packs torn apart, a waterskin dragged into the brush.

events.name: Widowmaker
events.gmPrompt: A creak and groan from above. A dead branch, heavy with rot, shifts in the canopy directly over the sleeping camp.
events.checkContext: Perception check to spot the falling branch before it hits a sleeper.
events.gmGuidance: The 'Roll Target' button selects which sleeper is underneath. At higher levels the damage is trivial but the narrative still works. Consider describing the near-miss on a triumph.
events.description: A creak and groan from above. A dead branch, heavy with rot, shifts in the canopy directly over the sleeping camp.

onTriumph.narrative: You heard the crack before anyone else. Sleepers moved, and the branch crashes harmlessly onto empty bedrolls. Good kindling. You drag it to the fire.

description.value: Dry wood harvested from a fallen branch. Burns well.

onSuccess.narrative: Sleepers rolled clear just as the branch hammers into empty bedrolls. Close call, no injuries. Some of the dry wood is worth keeping.

description.value: Dry wood harvested from a fallen branch. Burns well.

onMixed.narrative: You see it too late to move everyone clear. The branch clips a shoulder on the way down. Painful but not serious.

effects.description: Glancing blow from a falling branch.

onFailure.narrative: The branch catches a sleeper full across the back.

effects.description: A heavy branch falls on a sleeping character.

events.name: Creeping Fog
events.gmPrompt: A thick fog rolls in from the lowland. Everything beyond arm's reach disappears.
events.checkContext: Survival check to keep the camp together as the fog rolls in.
events.gmGuidance: Without a watch, everyone wakes in fog with no reference points. Escalate: the party loses time and supplies trying to regroup at dawn. Consider allowing alternative skills (Arcana for a light cantrip, etc.).
events.description: A thick fog rolls in from the lowland. Everything beyond arm's reach disappears.

onTriumph.narrative: You smelled the damp before it arrived. Fire stoked, landmarks called out, gear pulled close. The fog came and went. Dawn came without incident.

onSuccess.narrative: Tight watch rotations. Fog burns off at dawn. Camp intact. A tense but uneventful night.

onMixed.narrative: Fog rolled in heavier than expected. Camp held together but packing up at dawn was slow. Some small items misplaced in the murk.

onFailure.narrative: Something used the fog as cover. The party wakes to tracks circling camp and supplies disturbed.

events.name: Moonlit Clearing
events.gmPrompt: The watch finds a small clearing carpeted in wildflowers. Mushrooms ring the edges in perfect circles.
events.checkContext: Nature check to identify useful plants and fungi in the clearing.
events.gmGuidance: Discovery only fires if a watch is set. The fairy ring is colour, not mechanical. At higher levels consider rarer herbs (via ResourceSource scaling).
events.description: The watch finds a small clearing carpeted in wildflowers. Mushrooms ring the edges in perfect circles.

onTriumph.narrative: You recognise the fairy ring and know exactly what grows here. A careful harvest yields choice mushrooms and a clutch of useful herbs tucked between the roots.

description.value: Edible plants and mushrooms gathered from the forest. Good for a meal.

onSuccess.narrative: Edible mushrooms and a few useful herbs. A good find.

description.value: Edible plants and mushrooms gathered from the forest. Good for a meal.

onMixed.narrative: You pick a few mushrooms but are not confident enough to harvest the rest in the dark. Better safe than sorry.

description.value: Edible plants and mushrooms gathered from the forest. Good for a meal.

onFailure.narrative: Beautiful to look at, but you are not confident enough to pick anything in the dark. The risk of grabbing something toxic is too high.

events.name: Dawn Chorus
events.gmPrompt: The first birds begin before dawn. One song, then another, until the canopy rings with it. The air smells of damp earth.
events.gmGuidance: Pure atmosphere. No mechanical consequence. A good omen for the day ahead. Rest undisturbed.
events.description: The first birds begin before dawn. One song, then another, until the canopy rings with it. The air smells of damp earth. A good omen for the day ahead.
